MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dana Flanagan-McBeth, esq. (916-323-3354) for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Motion To Set Aside Settlement:

Lienholder California Department of Tax and Fee Administration's objection and motion to set aside settlement is denied, on the condition that Defendants issue separate checks to lienholders including medical providers entitled to compensation from the settlement amount.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
